channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lindsey Vonn falls while on pace for top-5 finish at super-G in Cortina but avoids injury again
item.description: CORTINA D'AMPEZZO, Italy (AP) — Lindsey Vonn fell while on pace for a top-5 finish at a World Cup super-G on Sunday to mark the second time she's gone down in four days during her comeback to ski racing at age 40. Again, the American came away mostly unscathed.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Hobie: How the best Lions season in history ended in stunning defeat
item.description: Super Bowl runs often hinge on capturing lightning in a bottle, and the Lions seemed to have it all. That’s what makes Saturday’s loss in the NFC Divisional Round to the Commanders so shocking.
item.dc:creator: Hobie Artigue, Local 4

item.title: Alexander Zverev returns to the Australian Open quarterfinals and faces Tommy Paul next
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — No. 2 seed Alexander Zverev reached the Australian Open quarterfinals for the fourth time by beating No. 14 Ugo Humbert 6-1, 2-6, 6-3, 6-2 with the help of 19 aces and a 43-23 advantage in total winners on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Coco Gauff writes 'RIP TikTok USA' on a TV camera at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — American tennis star Coco Gauff mourned the loss of TikTok's app back home, writing on a TV camera lens “RIP TikTok USA” and drawing a broken heart right after winning a match at the Australian Open to reach the quarterfinals.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Islam Makhachev submits late-replacement Renato Moicano in 1st round at UFC 311
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Lightweight champion Islam Makhachev submitted 10th-ranked Renato Moicano at 4:05 of the first round Saturday night at UFC 311 for his 15th straight victory.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Turnovers and depleted defense contribute to top-seeded Lions' quick playoff exit
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — The Detroit Lions had everything set up the way they wanted this time. After losing last season's NFC championship game at San Francisco, they went 15-2 to earn the NFC's top seed.
item.dc:creator: DAVE HOGG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Watch Dan Campbell’s emotional post-game press conference after Lions loss to Washington
item.description: An emotional Dan Campbell spoke to the media after the Lions were stunned by the Washington Commanders in the NFL’s divisional playoff round.
item.dc:creator: Joel Sebastianelli, Local 4

item.title: Bryan hits 7 3s, scores career-high 35 points to help Santa Clara upset No. 16 Gonzaga, 103-99
item.description: After scoring 54 points in a loss to Loyola Marymount, the Broncos put up 103 points to stun Gonzaga Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Bertuzzi, Jones help Blackhawks beat slumping Golden Knights 5-3
item.description: Tyler Bertuzzi scored two power-play goals and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the slumping Vegas Golden Knights 5-3 on Saturday night to end a four-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mahomes and Kelce help Chiefs to a 23-14 win over Texans and another AFC title game trip
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes has never lost in the divisional round of the playoffs with the Kansas City Chiefs. The Houston Texans still have never won.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Coco Gauff drops a set but reaches the Australian Open quarterfinals. Sabalenka wins, too
item.description: Coco Gauff dropped a set but came back to beat Belinda Bencic and reach the Australian Open quarterfinals.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: ESPN college basketball analyst Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting delayed by accident at home
item.description: Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting following cancer treatments will be delayed after the ESPN college basketball analyst had an accident at his Florida home. Vitale announced Saturday he will not be on the call for next Saturday's game between No.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sepp Straka surges to 4-shot lead over Hoffman, Day, Lower through 3 rounds at The American Express
item.description: LA QUINTA, Calif. (AP) — Sepp Straka's game has been almost as clean as his head through three rounds at The American Express.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Washington retires its first women's jersey, sending Kelsey Plum's No. 10 to the rafters
item.description: It was always a matter of when — not if — Washington would retire Kelsey Plum’s number. Eight years after she graduated, it happened.
item.dc:creator: JOSH KIRSHENBAUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Neal scores career-high 24 and Creighton snaps No. 14 UConn's 28-game home winning streak, 68-63
item.description: STORRS, Conn. (AP) — Jamiya Neal had a career-high 24 points to help Creighton snap UConn's 28-game home winning streak with a 68-63 victory on Saturday. The 14th-ranked Huskies hadn't lost at home since an 82-79 loss on Jan. 25, 2023, to then-No. 13 Xavier.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Super Bowl champ says NFL's Rooney Rule a 'joke' to teams, criticizes how Patriots complied
item.description: Super Bowl champion Ryan Clark blasted the New England Patriots on "Inside the NFL" for how they complied with the NFL's Rooney Rule when they hired Mike Vrabel.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sammy Sosa gets warm reception for his reconciliation with the Chicago Cubs
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Sammy Sosa jogged onto the stage, carrying an American flag. The crowd cheered wildly. It was just like old times — only Sosa was dressed in a suit, and the scene occurred in a downtown hotel ballroom instead of Wrigley Field.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Several Chicagoland AMC locations to air the College Football Playoff championship game
item.description: CHICAGO — Notre Dame will face off against Ohio State on Monday in the College Football Playoff championship game in Atlanta, and while traveling to the game may not be an option for some, fans in Chicago can still get a taste of the larger-than-life action at some AMC theaters.
item.dc:creator: Gabriel Castillo, WGN 9

item.title: Return of Sammy Sosa a big draw for fans at Cubs Convention 2025
item.description: The convention promises a weekend of panel discussions, autograph opportunities and the appearance of one of the best all-time hitters, fan favorite Sammy Sosa.
item.dc:creator: Erik Runge, WGN 9

item.title: South Side native Katie Schumacher-Cawley coaches PSU to national v-ball title while undergoing cancer treatment
item.description: LOUISVILLE, Ky./CHICAGO (AP, WGN) — Katie Schumacher-Cawley, a native of the Mount Greenwood neighborhood on Chicago's South Side, is an NCAA national champion — for a second time. But there's so much inspiration to her story beyond just winning on the court.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Sammy Sosa to attend 2025 Cubs Convention, team announces
item.description: Former Chicago Cub and fan favorite Sammy Sosa will attend the 2025 Cubs Convention, the team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Montréal Canadiens hockey player struck by car while in Salt Lake City
item.description: The team later confirmed Emil Heineman suffered an "upper-body" injury and is expected to be sidelined for three to four weeks.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, NewsNation

item.title: House Republicans pass bill to ban transgender athletes from girls’ sports
item.description: House Republicans passed a bill Tuesday to bar transgender student-athletes from competing in girls’ sports, putting the contentious issue front and center following an election cycle that saw it become a frequent target of Republicans.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, NewsNation

item.title: Connor Ingram returns for Utah Hockey Club
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club began a seven-game homestand last week by winning just one of three games. But they still have four games left at the Delta Center beginning Tuesday night against Montreal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: New England hires former Patriots Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as coach
item.description: The New England Patriots have hired Mike Vrabel as their head coach. The team announced the hiring Sunday morning, a week after Patriots owner Robert Kraft fired Jerod Mayo following the team’s season-ending victory over the Buffalo Bills. Mayo finished 4-13 in his lone season.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, NewsNation
